name: I missed some work after injury but no doctors note, can I get paid in Bountiful Utah?
description: Yes with proof; get doctor note ASAP.[1]

mainEntity.name: I missed some work after injury but no doctors note, can I get paid in Bountiful Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes with proof; get doctor note ASAP.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if employer verifies absence due to injury, but lack of note weakens claim; Utah requires proof of work-related disability. Submit FROI timely.[1] Key factors: witness corroboration, light duty refusal records. Get retroactive treatment, document symptoms; appeal denials. Notes solidify lost wage benefits.
